results.title: ‘Loopholes and deflections’: Opponents slam Labor’s gambling reform
results.description: Independent MPs and gambling reform advocates have criticised the Albanese government’s proposed changes to gambling laws.

results.title: Teenager’s impressive run ends with third-round loss
results.description: PARIS -- Teenager Moise Kouame's French Open run ended when he lost to Alejandro Tabilo 4-6, 6-3, 6-4, 7-6 (9) in the third round Saturday.

results.title: WHO chief is confident Ebola outbreak in DR Congo can be stopped
results.description: Health teams are racing to contain the emergency that has spread across several provinces in the DRC and into neighbouring Uganda.

results.title: World : Indonesia-Born Giant Panda Cub Makes Public Debut
results.description: JAKARTA, May 31 (Bernama-Xinhua) -- Taman Safari Indonesia (TSI) officially introduced Rio, the first giant panda cub born in the country, to the public on Saturday in Bogor, south of Jakarta, reported Xinhua.

results.title: General : Identity Verification Required For Sponsored Ads On Social Media - Teo
results.description: MELAKA, May 31 (Bernama) -- All advertisers using sponsored advertisements on social media platforms will be required to verify identities in a bid to curb online fraud, Deputy Communications Minister Teo Nie Ching said.

results.title: Wordle Answer Today: Solution for May 31, 2026 Puzzle #1807 Sparks Musical Puzzle Discussions
results.description: Wordle puzzle No. 1807 featured 'ETUDE', a musical term, challenging players with its vowel-heavy composition. The puzzle sparked lively discussions and highlighted Wordle's cultural impact.

results.title: 'He is something truly special': Tendulkar lauds Sooryavanshi's 'magnificent' batting prowess
results.description: New Delhi: India's legendary cricketer Sachin Tendulkar has heaped praise on 15-year-old sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, describing him as a truly special talent while also lauding the ability of the...

results.title: Sport : KLBA Seeks Meeting With Hannah, KL Mayor Over Training Base Issue
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR, May 31 (Bernama) -- The Kuala Lumpur Badminton Association (KLBA) plans to hold discussions with Minister in the Prime Minister’s Department (Federal Territories) Hannah Yeoh as part of efforts to make the Cheras Badminton Arena here its permanent training centre.

results.title: Management of Bohyeba FM seeks police investigations after fire incident
results.description: A fire outbreak has completely destroyed the facilities of Bohyeba FM in the Central Region, prompting management to seek a police investigation into the cause of the incident.

results.title: NYPD School Crossing Guard, Yohanna Florencio, 37, Arrested

results.title: Historic Glasgow school set to be transformed into 24 flats with gardens in former playground
results.description: The planning application is under consideration by the council.

results.title: IPL 2026: What happens if RCB vs GT final is washed out? Know all the rules
results.description: Ahmedabad, May 31 (SocialNews.XYZ) The 19th season of the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 is coming to an end as the defending champions, Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) will clash with 2022 winners Gujarat Titans (GT)... The post IPL 2026: What happens if RCB vs GT final is washed out? Know all the rules appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: PSG edge Arsenal on penalties to retain Champions League title
results.description: Paris Saint-Germain claimed back-to-back Champions League triumphs with a 4-3 shoot-out win over Arsenal following a 1-1 draw after extra time on Saturday, with Eberechi Eze and Gabriel missing from the spot.

results.title: HK's first astronaut home by 2027, with live space chat in the works: Tech chief
results.description: The homecoming for the city's first astronaut could come as early as the first half of 2027, with plans underway for a space live chat between Hong Kong students and the Shenzhou-23 crew, according to Secretary for Innovation, Technology and Industry Sun Dong.

results.title: Wemby edges closer to lifelong dream as Spurs knock out Thunder
results.description: Victor Wembanyama is within sight of realizing a lifelong dream after the San Antonio Spurs beat the Oklahoma City Thunder to set up an NBA Finals clash with the New York Knicks.

results.title: China patrols Scarborough Shoal after Philippines warns of threat
results.description: China's military and coast guard said they carried out patrols near Scarborough Shoal in the South China Sea on Sunday, a day after the Philippine defence minister said Manila remained under threat from Beijing despite a recent easing in U.S.-China tensions.

results.title: HK Express cancels six Okinawa flights as Tropical Storm Jangmi nears
results.description: HK Express has canceled six flights to and from Okinawa on Monday (Jun 1) and Tuesday (Jun 2) as Typhoon Jangmi approaches Japan’s southern islands.
